name: JumpCloud Groups Using Personal Email Domains
description: Detects JumpCloud groups configured with personal email domains.
query: SELECT g.id AS id, g.name AS group_name, g.email FROM jumpcloud_groups g WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(g.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\.com'
remediation: Update group email aliases to approved corporate domains and remove legacy personal-domain aliases.
